query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `leadership_feedback` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agentUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `conductedByUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `meetingDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `summary` text NOT NULL,
  `strengths` text,
  `areasForImprovement` text,
  `goals` text,
  `followUpDate` timestamp NULL,
  `rating` int,
  `isPrivate` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `leadership_feedback_agentUserId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`agentUserId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `leadership_feedback_conductedByUserId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`conductedByUserId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);

  CONSTRAINT `leadership_feedback_conductedByUserId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`conductedByUserId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
